task_statement: CR.v4 P3 hard fan-in cleanup after 3-axis subagent review. Preserve the existing correct direction: hard fan-in source QA/Inspector/evidence concerns are local Agent evidence before closure-synthesis, Link Movement remains forward, closure-synthesis is the Link-facing concern source. Close the remaining HOLDS-WITH-FIXES gaps: fail-close invalid transition_concern_adoption literals on graph/compose/driver ingress; validate advisory/local transition_concern_evidence structurally without adopting/rerouting it; align stale Link-facing wording in graph validator and return templates; broaden checker proof beyond only fan-code-qa where appropriate; preserve closure-origin concern adoption. Do not add a new engine, scheduler, queue, retry runtime, Movement literal, target selector, --large route, or manual required_return_shape/carry injection. QA may inspect/probe only and must not source-mutate.

nodes.work_statement: Implement only the P3 hard fan-in cleanup. Inspect current live dirty state and preserve existing changes. Required repairs: (1) invalid transition_concern_adoption values must fail closed on compose/graph/driver ingress instead of silently becoming binding; use Link-owned ADOPTION_LITERALS. (2) advisory/local transition_concern_evidence must still be structurally validated as Agent evidence, but must not be adopted/rerouted/HOLDed before closure solely because it is a valid source-lane concern. Malformed local concern should be visible as invalid Agent returned evidence. (3) stale wording in composition_graph_validate.py and return.yaml next_link_input_sections must not call source-lane concern Link-facing before closure. (4) broaden focused checker/profile proof so source-local concern behavior is not proven only for fan-code-qa if the invariant names QA/Inspector/evidence lanes; if evidence-integrity/inspect should not carry transition_concern_evidence, narrow the invariant wording and checker honestly instead of pretending. (5) preserve closure-origin concern adoption/full-replay behavior. Keep Brick templates owning required_return_shape and carries_forward_fields; do not shrink return shapes to observed_evidence/not_proven. Run focused checks if possible.

Codex code/regression QA. Inspect the diff and run focused checks. Attack: invalid transition_concern_adoption literals fail closed; advisory valid local concerns are validated but not pre-closure adopted; malformed local concern is not silently ignored; closure-origin concern adoption/full replay still works; no --large/helper route or manual return-shape/carry injection was introduced; QA did not source-mutate. Do not source-mutate.

Gemini-local axis/evidence QA. Attack Brick/Agent/Link boundaries. Brick: templates own work contract/return shape/carry. Agent: returned facts remain closed and local concern evidence is not suppressed. Link: advisory/binding are Link-owned policy literals and Movement remains forward/reroute only; support does not choose target or Movement. Do not source-mutate; if provider/tool limits block inspection, return exact not_proven.

Codex closure. Fan in work, Codex QA, and Gemini axis QA. Report FORWARD/HOLD/REROUTE/NOT_PROVEN as support evidence only. HOLD if invalid adoption literals still silently bind, advisory local concerns bypass validation entirely, source-lane concerns still become Link-facing before closure, closure-origin adoption is broken, QA source-mutated, or checker evidence is missing. Do not claim success, quality, source truth, or Movement authority.

proof_limits: does not prove full customer-ready goal
